summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Cryptix cryptocurrency trading platform. Backend APIs working with 93.3% success rate, frontend fully functional with complete Arabic localization, professional blue design, and all core features working including registration, trading, wallet management, and deposit system.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - both codes indicate authentication failure

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
CoinGecko API integration - crypto prices, single price, chart data
User registration in Arabic with $10,000 initial USD balance
User login/logout functionality with session management
JWT authentication and authorization working correctly
Dashboard displaying portfolio value in Arabic numerals ($١٠٬٠٠٠٫٠٠)
Market table showing 10+ cryptocurrencies with live prices
Trading page with Bitcoin charts and live price display ($٧٠٬٢٩٩٫٠٠)
Buy/Sell trading interface with Arabic labels
Wallet page showing total portfolio value and assets
Deposit page with payment method selection
Transaction history tracking and display
Dark/Light theme toggle working smoothly
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Trading, Wallet, Deposit)
Complete Arabic localization throughout the platform
Professional blue design with gradients and glass effects
Responsive design - mobile viewport tested
Excellent page load performance (1.35 seconds)
User session management and automatic logout
Arabic numerals display correctly
All buttons and interactions working smoothly
